content:
# Bromate

**Summary**: An inorganic byproduct of ozone treatment in water containing bromide.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011]] monitored bromate levels during ozonation processes.

## Scientific Context

- [[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011]] Bromate is a major concern in ozone treatment of bromide-rich water.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011]] Ion Chromatography.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Bromate was found to be a potential human carcinogen (IARC Group 2B). ([[2011-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2011, p. 21]])
